title: Operations Assistant - 6 Months Contract
description:
“Build the Future of Automotive with Us.”

In Singapore, Auto Selection offers a wide range of accessible, affordable and quality pre-owned cars that have passed stringent levels of pre-sale inspection and are backed by the Auto Selection Approved Warranty.  

Auto Selection aims to transform the pre-owned car buying experience. In Singapore, our services include direct selling valuations, trade-in, finance, insurance, and after-sales support for all customers. 

As part of Sime Group, ranked No. 25 in the Fortune Southeast Asia 500, we’re connected to a powerful network across nine markets in the Asia-Pacific region. With over 13,900 employees, Sime Motors is a leader in automotive assembly, importation, distribution, retail, and after-sales services.


What You’ll Be Doing

As an Operations Assistant in our Pre-Owned Cars segment, you’ll be supporting our car showroom and vehicle preparation processes.

Showroom Vehicles

  • Perform daily checks to ensure showroom cars are in good condition and properly parked

  • Coordinate and maintain accurate records of the movement and transfer of vehicles between locations

  • Ensure showroom cars display correct spec sheets and model plates

  • Complete proper vehicles handover checks and documentation

  • Arrange showroom cars for workshops or vendors servicing when required

Sold & Delivery Vehicles

  • Ensure sold cars are parked at designated areas with proper signage

  • Send vehicles for STA inspection/Agent/External vendors

  • Create and follow up on job entries in Salesforce/Planner

  • Coordinate delivery schedules closely with Sales Consultants

  • Ensure vehicles are thoroughly checked and detailed before customer delivery

  • Do tyre/battery checklist

  • Accountability of Delivery Packs (2 master keys, Owner Manual and Service Booklet)

Other Responsibilities

  • Communicate and coordinate with stakeholders

  • Support and participate in sales events as required

  • Generate Purchase Order amount accurately and promptly for superior approval

  • Maintain the accuracy of vehicle locations

  • To assist in monthly stock take

Who We’re Looking For

  • Class 3 driving license is a must and fluent in English with prior technical knowledge in automotive industry is a plus

  • Minimum GCE N Level or equivalent with 2 years of relevant experience

  • Customer-focused & detail-oriented

  • Strong planning skills to manage vehicle movements for smooth operations

  • Proficient in Basic Microsoft Office tools

  • This is a 6-month contract position (5.25 – Alternate Sunday)

Why Join Us at Sime Motors?

  • Be part of a trusted brand with a regional footprint

  • Work with cutting-edge automotive technology

  • Grow your career in a supportive, performance-driven culture

  • Enjoy structured training, career progression, and employee benefits
